reason: Verified that the agent can successfully open a browser, navigate to a URL, retrieve the page title, and respond with the correct information.
steps: Navigated to http://localhost:47891 - Successfully loaded the Super Agent application showing three agents in the sidebar.
Clicked on the "QA-20260421-164034-ctu9" agent in the sidebar - Successfully opened the agent's chat interface.
Typed message "Open a browser and go to https://example.com. Tell me the page title." in the input field - Message was entered correctly in the textbox.
Clicked the "Send message" button - Message was sent and agent began processing.
Waited up to 3 minutes for response - Agent completed the task in approximately 9 seconds.
Verified response mentions "Example Domain" - The agent's response clearly states "The page title is Example Domain." with the domain name in bold text.
